reviews.name: Priscila M.
reviews.comment: Loved this BookBox! Great selection and I even found a zine I wasn’t expecting. Super cool vibe and easy to use. Definitely coming back.

reviews.name: Làura F.
reviews.comment: Nice spot, but it was almost empty when I got there. Would love to see more book swaps happening. Still a cool idea though!

reviews.name: Mie
reviews.comment: This little BookBox feels like a hidden treasure! I left a book I love and found one I didn’t know I needed. It made my day.
